fields.name: name
fields.description: The identifier or label for the contact.

fields.name: email
fields.description: The electronic mail address for contact.

fields.name: phone
fields.description: The phone number associated with the entity.

fields.name: company
fields.description: The organization or business associated with the contact.

fields.name: role
fields.description: The function or position of this entity within a relationship.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-form text providing additional information.

fields.name: pendingId
fields.description: A unique identifier awaiting confirmation or processing.

events.name: CREATE
events.description: Signals the creation of a new record.

events.name: CONTACT_SEARCH
events.description: Triggers a search for contacts.

events.name: CONTACT_NOTIFICATIONS_OPEN
events.description: Indicates new contact notifications are available.

events.name: CONTACT_CREATED
events.description: Signals the creation of a new contact record.
events.synonyms: new contact, add contact, contact added

events.name: CONTACT_UPDATED
events.description: Signals that a contact's details have been modified.

events.name: CONTACT_DELETED
events.description: Signals a contact record has been removed.

events.name: DO_CREATE
events.description: Initiates the creation of a new record.

events.name: DO_UPDATE
events.description: Indicates data has been modified and needs to be refreshed.

events.name: DO_DELETE
events.description: Initiates the removal of a record.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The identifier or label for the contact.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation or summary of the item.

fields.name: sku
fields.description: Unique identifier for a product or item.
fields.synonyms: product code, item number, part number

fields.name: price
fields.description: The monetary cost associated with the item.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: The number of items or units.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Classification or type of the item.

fields.name: pendingId
fields.description: A unique identifier awaiting final assignment or processing.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Approval/workflow state of the item.

events.name: CREATE
events.description: Signals the creation of a new record.

events.name: ITEM_SEARCH
events.description: A search query for items has been submitted.

events.name: ITEM_NOTIFICATIONS_OPEN
events.description: Indicates new notifications are available for items.

events.name: ITEM_CREATED
events.description: Signals a new item has been created.

events.name: ITEM_UPDATED
events.description: Signals that an item's data has been modified and persisted.

events.name: ITEM_DELETED
events.description: Signals that an item has been removed.

events.name: DO_CREATE
events.description: Initiates the creation of a new record.

events.name: DO_UPDATE
events.description: Signals that data has been modified and should be refreshed.

events.name: DO_DELETE
events.description: Initiates the removal of a record.

events.name: GRANTED
events.description: An approver granted a held item request; replay the create from the carried payload.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Require approval before new items go live
overridableConfigKeys.description: When on, a new item is held as a pending approval request until an approver grants it; only then is the item created. Off by default.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: gate, sign-off, review before create, approval required, hold for review

fields.name: title
fields.description: The descriptive name or heading for the item.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Specifies the kind or category of the item.

fields.name: actor
fields.description: The individual or system performing an action.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time of the record's creation or last modification.
fields.synonyms: date, time, created, modified, last updated

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current state or condition of the item.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-form text containing additional information.

events.name: ACTIVITY_SEARCH
events.description: Triggers a search operation for activity records.

events.name: ACTIVITY_NOTIFICATIONS_OPEN
events.description: Indicates new activity notifications are available.

events.name: ACTIVITY_CREATED
events.description: Signals a new activity has been created.

events.name: ACTIVITY_UPDATED
events.description: Signals that an activity has been modified and saved.

events.name: ACTIVITY_DELETED
events.description: Signals that an activity record has been removed.

events.description: Indicates data has been modified and should be synchronized.

events.name: DO_DELETE
events.description: Initiates the removal of a record.
